## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Alexa's out-of-office plan and upcoming events/initiatives while she is away on vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/N_ENDU5BNdhBdqxhEnLyppxpSnpHh4Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jordan and team will handle key initiatives like webinars, sales enablement, and event planning (AI Dinner, CCW conference) while Alexa is out](https://fathom.video/share/N_ENDU5BNdhBdqxhEnLyppxpSnpHh4Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Focus on driving high attendance and engagement at CCW conference, aiming for 100+ new opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/N_ENDU5BNdhBdqxhEnLyppxpSnpHh4Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Provide coaching to ensure team represents company well at events](https://fathom.video/share/N_ENDU5BNdhBdqxhEnLyppxpSnpHh4Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Address situation where an employee (Jenny) made an insensitive comment to Jordan that needs to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/N_ENDU5BNdhBdqxhEnLyppxpSnpHh4Ug?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
